title: Moviola
collaboration: Interactive multi-media sculpture by Marcio Ambrosio
description:
Custom interactive 3d engine developed in MaxMSP-Jitter to handle animations and trajectories of unique objects or swarms of objects
                            / Design of an Arduino shield to connect to IR sensors to measure rotation of nine cranks disposed on a sphere in the center of the space
                            / The screen (a custom made half sphere designed by Marcio) is projected upon thru a round mirror and a precise mapping is obtained via MadMapper
                            / They are actuated by the visitors to control the installation in different ways depending on the scene we're in
longDescription:

                            / They are actuated by the visitors to control the installation in different ways depending on the scene we're in
